title: Thermal Endergy
description: Adding more of the balanced content you love to Thermal!
body:
Inspired by my old Ender IO addon (Ender IO Endergy), Thermal Endergy adds more of the balanced content* you love to Thermal. If you want faster machines, bigger drills and lower fuel consumption, then this is the mod for you!
*Warning: Content may not actually be balanced.

 

Thermal Endergy has over-powered content that expands on Thermal into the late game using the augments system with 3 new metals, inspired by the metals from Ender IO Endergy. It adds:

  • 3 new tiers of integral components, with 6x, 8.5x and 12x modifiers respectively, requiring resources from the End and beyond.
  • Nullifier Augments that massively improve certain attributes of your machines and dynamos, but at a great cost....

.. and more to come!

 

Upcoming updates will include:

  • Cross-mod integration for recipes and new augments
  • Enchanced tools with more upgrades expanding on Thermal Innovation

I am an official Akliz partner. Akliz provides fantastic support for all their servers, and has incredibly fast single-thread servers. If you want to support me, and net yourself a server, use the link above for a discount on an Akliz server.

If you have any other questions, ask them in our discord here.

Follow EpicSquid here for frequent progress updates!
